html.note: HTML changed because the PHP/TSX conditional class was applied to the rendered output, updating the discourse div classes

contentComparison.reason: HTML changed since last snapshot — full QA run performed to verify new conditional padding class rendering

build.detail: Build and lint pass with no errors. 8 pre-existing useEffect/useSelect exhaustive-deps warnings exist in unrelated blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) — not attributable to the Text block.

lint.detail: No lint warnings in Text block files.

registration.detail: block.json schema valid, naming matches takt/text, all file references exist, attribute types valid.

tsxPhpSync.detail: All sync checks passed: no PHP extract anti-pattern, docblock present with @var annotations, HTML structure matches, attribute usage consistent, no context inconsistency. The conditional class md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)] is correctly applied in both TSX (template literal on line 67) and PHP (inline ternary on line 44).

conditionalClass.detail: Verified rendered HTML contains correct discourse div classes across all 7 block instances. Blocks with eyebrow (5 instances): discourse div has 'md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)]'. Blocks without eyebrow (2 instances): discourse div has only 'discourse md:col-start-2'. Pattern matches spec exactly.

attributes.detail: All attributes (anchor, eyebrow, heading, description, buttons) present in block.json with correct types and defaults. No new attributes were added in this change — conditional class driven by existing eyebrow attribute.

edgeCases.detail: Block 2 (heading only, no eyebrow) correctly omits the padding class. Block 3 (no ThemeHeading content at all) also correctly omits padding class. Block with anchor ID (block 6, eyebrow 'Quick Access') correctly includes the padding class.

interactiveBehavior.reason: No interactive elements — Text block is a static layout block.

accessibility.detail: All 9 automated common QA rule checks passed: HTTP 200, block wrapper present, content not empty, no JS errors, no overflow at any viewport, all images have alt, all links have href, heading hierarchy valid, no animations (reduced-motion not applicable).

markupDuplication.detail: No duplicated markup for responsive. Single discourse div per block instance, conditional class applied via template literal / PHP ternary — no DOM duplication.

specCompliance.detail: Test page validation passed: 7 block instances match expected 7, all inside takt/demo-container wrappers, no stale markup, no unresolved placeholders. Conditional padding class matches spec (DEC-001): md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)] on the right column when eyebrow is present, matching ThemeHeading internal alignment pattern.

automated.REDUCED_MOTION: pass — no animations in block CSS

manual.RESPONSIVE_RENDER: pass — page renders at 375px, 768px, 1440px (screenshots captured, no overflow detected by automated check)
manual.DARK_THEME: skipped — Text block has no theme/color variant attribute

conditionalPaddingVerification.description: Core change verification: conditional md:pt-[calc(0.875rem*1.1+1rem)] on discourse div when eyebrow is present
